summary_one_line: ICC header 4-byte signature fields ('link' class at 0x0c, flag 01 at 0x2d) that drive a tag/stage read returning NULL mpe

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Specific 4-byte ICC header signature bytes: the profile/device-class field at offset 0x0c-0x0f set to 'link' (6c 69 6e 6b) instead of 'mntr', plus the flag byte at 0x2d=0x01 instead of 0x00. These steer the parser down the LUT-A2B reading path where cmsPipelineInsertStage is called with an mpe argument that is NULL (ReadSetOfCurves returns NULL), taking the blocked TRUE side of the NULL check.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds (value_profile_cmplog) carry 'link' at 0x0c-0x0f and 0x2d=0x01; the 1-hop caller block shows the whole Type_LUTA2B_Read path (lines 2571-2588) hit only by W [W] markers, and the d=1 divergent branch shows the TRUE side (T=11) reached only on the W role.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds (value_profile) keep 'mntr' at 0x0c-0x0f and 0x2d=0x00, so the LUT-A2B reader / NULL-mpe path is never structured correctly; the d=1 branch row shows L took only the FALSE side (F=310, T=0) and never the blocked TRUE side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which splices logged 4-byte CMP operands (the ICC signature constants 'link', flag 0x01) directly into the matching input-byte offsets. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so it cannot reliably land these exact multi-byte signature words via input-to-state substitution and stays on the FALSE side.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the TRUE side of the NULL check in cmsPipelineInsertStage and only the winner role reaches it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1514  T=11 F=0  T=0 F=310  if (lut == NULL || mpe == NULL)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds carry 'link' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f where loser seeds carry 'mntr'.
The winner role's seeds set the flag byte at 0x2d to 0x01 while the loser keeps 0x00.
The mpe argument to cmsPipelineInsertStage is the return of ReadSetOfCurves on the LUT-A2B path, which the winner role exercises.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: [W]  2581          if (!cmsPipelineInsertStage(NewLUT, cmsAT_END, ReadSetOfCurves(self, io, BaseOffset + offsetA, inputChan))) <-- CALL

evidence_trail.claim: The winning seeds were produced by value_profile_cmplog, the fuzzer with I2SRandReplace.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace so cannot perform input-to-state substitution of the signature constants.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the value_profile machinery.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2207 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0551798f555a68d1` and observed an I2S-floor row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 7 of the 8-level ancestor chain; tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 7', the characteristic unwrapped-I2S cmplog/vpc signal.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the same NULL-mpe path on the 4-byte signature word where value_profile resolves the blocker as often as value_profile_cmplog (i.e. no I2S advantage despite the multi-byte exact-match requirement) would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the 'link' signature word and 0x2d=0x01 flag are the actual CMP operands that gate the NULL-mpe path (vs merely correlated header bytes) is inferred from the caller source, not directly confirmed by a CMP-trace.
